{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Takekunihiko-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 別名 = Take-Ōomi-no-Mikoto, Takeōomi-no-Mikoto
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 =
| 官位 =
}}
'''Takekunihiko-no-Mikoto''' (''takekunihiko no mikoto''; dates of birth and death unknown) was a {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} of the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. Also known as '''Take-Ōomi-no-Mikoto''' (''take-ōomi no mikoto'').

== Overview ==
Alternate names include '''Takeōomi-no-Mikoto'''<ref>{{ill|Nakada Norinobu|ja|中田憲信}}, "Suwa-shi," ''Shokeifu'', Vol. 13.</ref> and '''Take-Ōomi-no-Mikoto'''<ref>{{ill|Nobekawa Kazuhiko|ja|延川和彦}}, "Suwa-shi Keizu," ''Shūho Suwa-shi Keizu. Seihen'', Iida Kōtarō, Taishō 10 (1921), p. 25.</ref>.

According to the traditions of Suwa Shrine Naka-sha enshrined in {{ill|Hokuto, Yamanashi|ja|北杜市|lt=Hokuto City|lt_ja=北杜市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}, and the ''Kai Kokushi'', during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇|lt=Emperor Sujin|lt_ja=崇神朝}}, {{ill|Take-Nunakawa-Wake-no-Mikoto|ja|建沼河別命}} was enfeoffed in the western region for his merits in the eastern expedition, and his grandson Ōomi-no-Mikoto was appointed Suwa no Kuni no Miyatsuko and built a shrine in the same area. Additionally, in one manuscript of the "{{ill|Kokuzō Hongi|ja|国造本紀}}," he appears as having been appointed Suha no Kuni no Miyatsuko during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Keikō|ja|景行天皇|lt=Emperor Keikō|lt_ja=景行朝}}, but there is a theory that this description is a miswriting or confusion with the {{ill|Nasu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|那須国造}}<ref>Satō Yūichi, ''Shinano no Kokuzō Seiryoku''.</ref>.

== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}
*{{ill|Suwa Taisha|ja|諏訪大社}}
*{{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}
*{{ill|Suwa Province|ja|諏訪国}}
*{{ill|Yagata-Sukune-no-Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神}}
*{{ill|Takeminakata-Wake-no-Mikoto|ja|武美名別命}}
*{{ill|Takekumateru-no-Mikoto|ja|健隈照命}}
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:たけくにひこのみこと}}
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:信濃国の人物]]
[[Category:諏訪氏]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:長野県の歴史]]

{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{People-stub}}
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:武国彦命]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
